summary: Frontend-only redesign validation for Sanctum Interview Study Desk. All 13 requested test scenarios pass. Warm parchment/serif aesthetic renders correctly, floating labels have replaced all visible placeholders across Login/Register/Home/Profile, and the critical client-side PDF download works flawlessly (10,821-byte valid PDF, zero backend calls). Test performed against preview URL with the seeded reader@sanctum.study account and pre-existing plan 6a4fda1a6e07e2b9f72bbb4f.

issues: Horizontal step-indicator row '01 · PASTE ROLE ◆ 02 · ADD RÉSUMÉ ◆ 03 · DRAFT PLAN' overflows viewport on narrow mobile — trailing text is clipped (last step cut off). Minor: consider wrapping or scroll-x, or hiding on <=390px.

action_items: (Optional / low priority) Wrap or hide the numbered step-indicator row on Desk hero on mobile <=390px to prevent horizontal clipping of '03 · DRAFT PLAN'.
critical_code_review_comments: interview.jsx q-card toggle logic is correct: setExpandedQuestion(expandedQuestion === index ? null : index) properly enforces single-expand + click-again-to-collapse.
PDF generation is fully client-side via jspdf in generateResumePdfClientSide — no /api/interview/resume/pdf/* calls observed. Fix for the original PDF bug is real and working.

Placeholder-elimination is thorough: 0 non-empty placeholder attributes on inputs across Login, Register, Home (job/self-description/resume file), and Profile edit forms — floating labels used consistently.
data-testid coverage is excellent across nav, forms, report list, interview q-cards, roadmap days, skill-gaps, delete-modal, and profile edit — testable UI.
seed_data_creation: None — used pre-seeded plan id 6a4fda1a6e07e2b9f72bbb4f. Delete flow was tested only up to 'Keep it' (cancel) so the seeded plan remains intact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login endpoint /api/auth/login works. On login page load the app fires an /api/auth/me (or similar) which returns 401 when unauthenticated — this is normal and shows up as console errors but does not affect UX. The 'Draft my interview plan' submit button correctly gates on (jobDescription && (resumeFile || selfDescription)). All click-to-expand q-cards work; if testing via Playwright, click the inner '.q-head' button (not the outer div), otherwise the second click can land inside the newly-rendered '.q-body' area. Mobile 390px shows Score/Content/Gaps tabs on interview page as expected.

detailed_verification.auth_pages: PASS — Login and Register render, floating labels lift on focus/value, no visible placeholders
detailed_verification.register_flow: PASS — /register renders with testids: username-input, email-input, password-input, register-submit; existing account login PASS
detailed_verification.desk_home: PASS — hero, notebook-lined job textarea, résumé upload dropzone, self-description textarea; recent plans lists seeded plan with 82/100
detailed_verification.draft_button_gating: PASS — disabled when empty; still disabled with only job description; ENABLED after job + self-description
detailed_verification.interview_page: PASS — /interview/6a4fda1a6e07e2b9f72bbb4f shows match-score-ring '82 MATCH', Technical(3), Behavioral(2), Roadmap(5), Skill Gaps(3: GraphQL, Kubernetes basics, Accessibility WCAG 2.2)
detailed_verification.q_card_behavior: PASS — click reveals Interviewer's intent + Model answer; clicking a different q-card collapses previous; clicking same q-card (on .q-head button) collapses it (class 'q-card expanded' -> 'q-card')
detailed_verification.section_nav: PASS — nav-technical/behavioral/roadmap switch content and 'active' class moves correctly; count badges (3/2/5) visible
detailed_verification.pdf_download: PASS (CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED) — download-pdf-btn triggers client-side jsPDF download. Suggested filename: interview_plan_senior_react_engineer.pdf. File size 10,821 bytes. Valid PDF magic bytes. ZERO network calls to /api/interview/resume/pdf/* or any backend PDF endpoint.
detailed_verification.profile_page: PASS — /profile shows profile-username, profile-email; Edit Study Card toggles profile-edit-username / profile-edit-email inputs (floating labels) + Save/Cancel; Cancel restores view
detailed_verification.delete_flow: PASS — report-delete-0 opens delete-modal; 'Keep it' closes modal without deletion; seeded plan preserved (did not test destructive 'Remove plan' path to keep seed intact per task note)
detailed_verification.placeholder_audit: PASS — 0 visible input/textarea placeholders on Login, Register, Home (all 3 inputs), Profile edit
detailed_verification.transitions: PASS visually — route change fade + hover lifts on report items observed in screenshots; floating labels animate on focus (confirmed on Login email focus screenshot)
detailed_verification.responsive_390px: PASS — header stacks with mobile-menu-btn visible, mobile menu opens, workspace stacks vertically, interview page shows Score/Content/Gaps mobile tabs
detailed_verification.console_errors: Only expected 401s from unauthenticated /api/auth/me checks on public pages — not user-facing
